case_title: SONYA SESSION VS. DARRYLE DWAYANE HOLMON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SESSION, SONYA AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMON, DARRYLE DWAYANE ACADEMY, HEBREW DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-28-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2003
ORDER VACATING SANCTION OF JULY 1, 2003 FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST SONYA SESSION, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-01-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-16-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-01-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
